prompts: Butanone, also known as methyl ethyl ketone, is a four-carbon ketone with the structural formula CH3C(O)C2H5, featuring a carbonyl group (C=O) on the second carbon atom in the chain. Butane-2,3-diol, an organic compound with the molecular formula C4H10O2, consists of a butane backbone with two hydroxyl (-OH) groups attached to the second and third carbons, specifically structured as CH3CH(OH)CH(OH)CH3, which classifies it as a diol.
